label: JavaScript implementation files are prohibited. FE/UI code must be browser-side TypeScript; BE/runtime/schema code must be SurrealQL.
Shell scripts must not become product/runtime logic, deployment decisions, validation ownership, or policy engines.
Notebook files are prohibited as runtime, validation, policy, or design-decision sources.
Opaque executable artifacts require an AgentQL runtime-tool manifest with checksum, permissions, provenance, SurrealDB binding, and proof that the tool owns no product/runtime decisions.
CI/CD YAML must not invoke Python, Node, npm, npx, bun, pip, pytest, or uv as hidden validation or business-logic engines.
